title: Help Needed: Setting Up monday.com for Our Construction company
excerpt:
Hello guys, 
We’re on the lookout for someone expert with monday.com to help us set up our workflow and boards as we’re moving from ClickUp to monday.com. We’re in the construction and property development industry, and …

posts.author: npirillis (Nikolas Pirillis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello guys,

We’re on the lookout for someone expert with monday.com to help us set up our workflow and boards as we’re moving from ClickUp to monday.com. We’re in the construction and property development industry, and we want to kick things off right with monday.com by setting up a solid company workflow and managing projects, clients and business in monday.com

If you’ve got the skills or know someone who does, hit us up. We’re keen on getting everything transitioned smoothly and could use an expert hand. Feel free to reach out if you’re interested or have any recommendations.

Thanks
Nikolas

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Happy Friday @npirillis,

Welcome to the community. You are in the right place to find a specialist to help you with your workflows. My name is Elena and I’m a founder of Kick Consulting, one of monday’s official channel partners.

We’ve specialised in monday for over 5 years and have helped several construction companies build out their CRM, project and job management workflows. We’ve also had plenty of clients move from Click Up to monday.

We offer an initial complimentary 60-min meeting to get to know you, your needs and pains and see if we can help you.

How to hear from you soon.

Elena
Our client case studies

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @npirillis ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 6 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have implemented many a similar workflows in the past, helping numerous construction companies set up clearly defined and easy-to-manage processes, including setting up project management workflows and CRMs. We are also experts at integrating any other platform you might use with monday.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @npirillis

Welcome to the monday .com community! To kick things right away with monday .com, boards and workflows creation is advisable. With custom monday .com workflows you can bring all of the elements of your construction business together. Workflows allow your team to collaborate on documentation, build up projects, and save time by leveraging many visual components. Through boards, you can track your sprint progress and easily detect any potential bottlenecks or problems. When you organize workflows using monday .com, you can enhance your project management by regulating project phases and offering a space where everyone understands and can work coherently.

If you’re looking to get started with monday .com workflow and board creation, hire monday.com consultants from a recognized service provider. These experts specialize in personalization and developing efficient workflows that modernize your operations/processes.
